summary: The diff implements most requested requirements: Arcanus is removed and Luffy is added to the backend with correct attributes (REQ-12), the frontend CharacterAvatar component conditionally displays Luffy's avatar and name (REQ-15), and GuessReveal shows character details. However, there is insufficient evidence that the question bank was comprehensively reviewed and updated (REQ-13), and no evidence that answer patterns for all characters were updated to match a revised question set (REQ-14).

missing_requirements.requirement: Review and update the question bank to ensure all questions are relevant to guessing anime characters, fictional characters, and other character types, removing any questions that don't help distinguish between characters
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows only a single placeholder question ('Is the character human?') in backend/main.mo. There is no evidence of a comprehensive question bank review, addition of diverse character-relevant questions (physical traits, powers, personality, occupation, origin story, relationships), or removal of irrelevant questions.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update answer patterns for all characters in the database to ensure they correctly map to the revised question set, with accurate Yes/No/Probably/Probably Not/Don't Know responses
missing_requirements.reason: Only Luffy's answer patterns are visible in the diff (4 simple patterns: human, fictional, occupation, gender). There is no evidence that other characters in the database have been updated with complete answer patterns matching a comprehensive question bank, nor that the decision tree can successfully narrow down to Luffy.
